description: Scheduled full-run catastrophic thresholds. These are loose regression gates for CI hardware variance and should be tightened after stable historical artifacts exist.

update_encoding_round_trip.reason: Full update encoding should not approach 500ms per iteration.

text_sequential_insert.reason: Full sequential text insert should not approach 500ms per iteration.

text_append.reason: Full text append should not approach 500ms per iteration.

text_prepend.reason: Full text prepend should not approach 500ms per iteration.

text_fragmented_delta_render.reason: Full fragmented delta rendering should not approach 500ms per iteration.

delta_apply_shallow.reason: Full shallow delta apply should not approach 500ms per iteration.

delta_render_shallow.reason: Full shallow delta render should not approach 500ms per iteration.

delta_render_deep.reason: Full deep delta render should not approach 500ms per iteration.
